name: Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the meat and onion in a large skillet until browned. Drain excess fat. Stir in remaining Meat Filling ingredients.
2. Fill manicotti shells with filling, packing into both ends. Place shells in an ungreased baking pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches).
3. Preheat oven to 375°F.
4. Heat mushrooms and Tomato Sauce ingredients (except Parmesan) until boiling. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
5. Pour sauce over filled shells. Cover with aluminum foil.
6. Bake for 1 1/2 to 1 3/4 hours, or until shells are tender. Sprinkle with cheese before serving.
